absolutely! i had a gross experience once and it was the best thing i ever did. weird, i know.

indeed! though, i do cherish those one-of-a-kind narratives so much they're almost worth a belly full of regret. but you can see why people dive in, stories just flow so wild when food gets involved! 🥟🌟
